name: qa
tagline: Runs an interactive QA session that clarifies bug reports, explores the codebase for context, and files structured GitHub issues.
verdict: Solid, safe skill: clear trigger phrasing, concrete issue templates and breakdown criteria, no security issues found. Weak on robustness — no negative-trigger guidance, no handling if gh is missing/unauthenticated or if the background Explore agent fails, and gh is never declared as a dependency. No versioning signal.

highlights.summary: No 'NOT for' exclusions or out-of-scope guidance anywhere in the description or body.
No guidance for `gh issue create` failing (gh missing/unauthenticated) or the background Explore agent failing.
Uses `gh issue create` throughout with no requirements section or check that gh is installed/authenticated.
